---
title: "24 March 2026: What are we working on?"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-03-24"
categories: [week_notes]
---

Full steam ahead on the tech work! Data processing, ONI dev work, etc.....

Several good chats with our HASS research infrastructure (RI) friends at [LDaCA](https://www.ldaca.edu.au/), [AIO](https://internetobservatory.org.au/), and [SIH](https://www.sydney.edu.au/research/facilities/sydney-informatics-hub.html)....

Planned our first "Work From QCIF Day"...
